title: Add total seats to Manage Departments
excerpt: When managing departments, I need to see the total of all seats and difference between that and number of seats in billing. This will make it easier to manage users and licenses.

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml: When managing departments, I need to see the total of all seats and difference between that and number of seats in billing. This will make it easier to manage users and licenses.
